meta.title: STEP 14 — §7.3 IDE close-out (H6 editor/)
meta.workspace_summary: Monorepo Lé Vibe: stack le-vibe/ + IDE editor/. Engineer advances tasks until §7.3 is implemented and verified — not doc-only.
meta.rag_notes: Authority: docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md §7.3, docs/PROMPT_BUILD_LE_VIBE.md ORDERED WORK QUEUE, docs/PM_STAGE_MAP.md STEP 14 row + *H1 vs §7.3 .deb bundles* (compile fail-fast), docs/STEP14_AUTONOMOUS_ENGINEER_RUNBOOK.md. Compile fail-fast (same as ./editor/smoke.sh / linux_compile): packaging/scripts/ci-vscodium-bash-syntax.sh → packaging/scripts/ci-editor-nvmrc-sync.sh → packaging/scripts/ci-vscodium-linux-dev-build.sh (→ editor/vscodium/dev/build.sh) — docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md, docs/apt-repo-releases.md *IDE package*, packaging/debian-le-vibe-ide/README.md. vscode_linux_build probe (shell, same classifier as lvibe ide-prereqs --json): packaging/scripts/probe-vscode-linux-build.sh. Preflight (all gaps at once): packaging/scripts/preflight-step14-closeout.sh [--require-stack-deb] — docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md *Preflight (all gaps)* (prints vscode_linux_build: after 14.c; stderr hint when not ready; packaging/scripts/build-le-vibe-debs.sh --with-ide exits before stack dpkg-buildpackage until ready — same doc *Failure (--with-ide)*); packaged le-vibe.desktop: desktop-file-validate when desktop-file-utils on PATH. Local gate: packaging/scripts/verify-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb; optional --apt-sim, --json (apt_sim_note, desktop_file_validate ran|skipped — docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md *--json close-out payload*); same desktop-file-validate when tool present. Test host manual-step14-install-smoke.sh --json includes desktop_file_validate_on_path (boolean, PATH probe for --verify-only). Stack le-vibe_*.deb discovery: packaging/scripts/resolve-latest-le-vibe-stack-deb.sh (verify-step14-closeout.sh --require-stack-deb, build-le-vibe-debs.sh find_stack_deb, manual-step14-install-smoke.sh default STACK_DEB) — parent of clone, then repo root — docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md *Output paths (from repo root)*. Test host after apt install both .debs: packaging/scripts/manual-step14-install-smoke.sh --verify-only (installed /usr/share/applications/le-vibe.desktop + desktop-file-validate when available). Partial VSCode-linux (missing bin/codium): editor/BUILD.md *Partial tree*, ./editor/print-built-codium-path.sh, ./editor/print-vsbuild-codium-path.sh, packaging/scripts/build-le-vibe-ide-deb.sh --help, docs/PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md *Partial VSCode-linux tree*, docs/apt-repo-releases.md *IDE package* (*Incomplete Linux build*). linux_compile tarball → editor/vscodium: packaging/scripts/install-vscodium-linux-tarball-to-editor-vendor.sh; CI artifact fetch recipe (offline script, no network; browser Actions UI or gh): packaging/scripts/print-github-linux-compile-artifact-hint.sh. lvibe ide-prereqs --print-closeout-commands (maintainer blocks by vscode_linux_build; partial: debian/lvibe.1 COMMANDS); packaging/scripts/print-step14-vscode-linux-bin-files.sh (same bin/ list as ide-prereqs --json); ./editor/print-ci-tarball-codium-path.sh (14.f temp unpack).
meta.continue_construction_note: Copy to .lvibe/session-manifest.json if you want PM epics in the workspace; ENGINEER mode does not require it to ship code.
meta.ai_pilot_note: Default: MODE ENGINEER every turn until §7.3 verified or SKIPPED+reason. Hard stop only USER_RESPONSE_REQUIRED / LÉ VIBE BLOCKED per docs/AGENT_MODE_ORCHESTRATION.md.

session_steps.title: Intent (optional)
session_steps.description: STEP 14 is already scoped by PRODUCT_SPEC §7.3 — skip if redundant.

session_steps.title: Repo orientation
session_steps.description: Confirm editor/, packaging/debian-le-vibe-ide/, packaging/scripts/build-le-vibe-debs.sh, docs/brand-assets.md icon path.

session_steps.title: Agents (optional)
session_steps.description: Enable skill agents from le-vibe/templates/agents/ if using .lvibe/ orchestration.

session_steps.title: Walk product.epics until STEP 14 done or honestly blocked
session_steps.description: Execute tasks in order; update task status; do not stall for owner orchestration.

epics.title: H6 — §7.3 Lé Vibe IDE: branded shell + installable .deb + lvibe-only CLI story
epics.description: PRODUCT_SPEC §7.3 is fixed — implement. Local/manual builds must reach same outcomes as CI when CI is optional. GitHub Actions are not the v1 completion gate.

tasks.title: Fast gate: ./editor/smoke.sh (and ci-editor-gate when packaging IDE .deb)
tasks.notes: editor/smoke.sh forwards to packaging/scripts/ci-editor-gate.sh; LEVIBE_EDITOR_GATE_ASSERT_BRAND=1 before IDE build when enforcing Lé Vibe–visible branding.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Smoke passes from repo root; --help documented paths behave; failures are actionable.

tasks.title: Align IDE chrome with canonical brand assets (no orphan marks)
tasks.notes: Canonical scalable icon: packaging/icons/hicolor/scalable/apps/le-vibe.svg. Presentation palette reference: docs/brand-assets.md (purple/ruby accents for diagrams; product name Lé Vibe). Sync linux icon assets per editor/le-vibe-overrides/sync-linux-icon-assets.sh when touching icons.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Branding layers under editor/le-vibe-overrides/ and packaging icon paths stay consistent; docs/brand-assets.md remains true.

tasks.title: Prove Linux dev build path (local or opt-in CI): node/.nvmrc, dev/build.sh story
tasks.notes: Fail fast: ci-vscodium-bash-syntax.sh + ci-editor-nvmrc-sync.sh before ci-vscodium-linux-dev-build.sh. See editor/BUILD.md, docs/ci-qa-hardening.md 14.e/14.f.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Documented path produces VSCode-linux-* (or tarball) when toolchain available; no silent skips — SKIPPED + reason if environment cannot compile.

tasks.title: Full-product .deb: packaging/scripts/build-le-vibe-debs.sh --with-ide
tasks.notes: Sibling le-vibe-ide .deb + stack le-vibe .deb; build-le-vibe-debs.sh --with-ide probes vscode_linux_build before stack dpkg-buildpackage (unless --vs-build); PM_DEB_BUILD_ITERATION.md success output + *Failure (--with-ide)*; packaging/debian-le-vibe-ide/README.md install both.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Script exits 0 with both debs when IDE build succeeds; Recommends: le-vibe on IDE package where specified; install smoke steps documented.

tasks.title: Keep E1 green; update PRODUCT_SPEC honesty / PM_STAGE_MAP only with evidence
tasks.notes: cd le-vibe && python3 -m pytest tests/ after Python changes. Do not claim STEP 14 done on tests/docs alone — need real branded IDE output + .deb path verified or SKIPPED.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Pytest passes; any STEP deferral uses SKIPPED + reason in the honest place per spec-phase2 §14.
